cc:Work.dc:title: Misc - NightLightBox
cc:Work.dc:description:
Simple decorative lamp with creatively laser cut plates
This is a simple light box with a closed compartment for electronics and the backlighting.
Created with Boxes.py (https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/) Command line: boxes NightLightBox --FingerJoint_style=rectangular --FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=1.0 --FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0 --FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0 --FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0 --FingerJoint_finger=2.0 --FingerJoint_play=0.0 --FingerJoint_space=2.0 --FingerJoint_width=1.0 --Stackable_angle=60 --Stackable_bottom_stabilizers=0.0 --Stackable_height=2.0 --Stackable_holedistance=1.0 --Stackable_width=4.0 --Hinge_grip_percentage=0 --Hinge_outset=0 --Hinge_outset=1 --Hinge_pinwidth=0.4 --Hinge_style=flush --Hinge_axle=2.5 --Hinge_grip_length=0 --Hinge_hingestrength=1 --DiffuserPlateTLockScrewDiameter=3.0 --DiffuserPlateTLockScrewLength=20.0 --DiffuserPlateTLockNutThickness=2.1 --DiffuserPlateTLockNutWidth=5.1 '--BackExtraHoles=R 20 15 11.5 8
C 11.58 15 3
C 28.42 15 3' '--BoxStyle=large face' --PlateVisibleWidth=150.0 --PlateVisibleHeight=75.0 --WoodPlatesCount=3 --WoodPlateThickness=5.0 --DiffuserPlateThickness=5.0 --BackgroundDepth=40.0 --InterPlateSpacing=10 --Margin=0.5 --thickness=3.0 --format=svg --tabs=0.0 --qr_code=0 --debug=0 --labels=0 --labels=1 --reference=100.0 --inner_corners=loop --burn=0.1 Command line short: boxes NightLightBox '--BackExtraHoles=R 20 15 11.5 8
C 11.58 15 3
C 28.42 15 3' Url: http://127.0.0.1:8000/NightLightBox?FingerJoint_style=rectangular&FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=1.0&FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0&FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0&FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0&FingerJoint_finger=2.0&FingerJoint_play=0.0&FingerJoint_space=2.0&FingerJoint_width=1.0&Stackable_angle=60&Stackable_bottom_stabilizers=0.0&Stackable_height=2.0&Stackable_holedistance=1.0&Stackable_width=4.0&Hinge_grip_percentage=0&Hinge_outset=0&Hinge_outset=1&Hinge_pinwidth=0.4&Hinge_style=flush&Hinge_axle=2.5&Hinge_grip_length=0&Hinge_hingestrength=1&DiffuserPlateTLockScrewDiameter=3.0&DiffuserPlateTLockScrewLength=20.0&DiffuserPlateTLockNutThickness=2.1&DiffuserPlateTLockNutWidth=5.1&BackExtraHoles=R+20+15+11.5+8%0D%0AC+11.58+15+3%0D%0AC+28.42+15+3&BoxStyle=large+face&PlateVisibleWidth=150.0&PlateVisibleHeight=75.0&WoodPlatesCount=3&WoodPlateThickness=5.0&DiffuserPlateThickness=5.0&BackgroundDepth=40.0&InterPlateSpacing=10&Margin=0.5&thickness=3.0&format=svg&tabs=0.0&qr_code=0&debug=0&labels=0&labels=1&reference=100.0&inner_corners=loop&burn=0.1&language=None&render=1
